strengths: ~15 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Title and scope sit at Senior/Staff IC level, not Director/Principal — no evidence of org-wide technical leadership, strategy, or advising executives, customers, or partners
No AI/ML depth: only a few months of adjacent agent-tooling work, no published AI products, platforms, research, or advanced degree in an AI-related field
No demonstrated cloud platform strategy or large-scale infrastructure ownership — experience is product-feature delivery (pricing, direct mail, GIS) rather than shaping future-state cloud/AI products

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/ML expertise and recognized products
No cloud platform strategy or customer-advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate is a competent senior/staff individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the resume does not support a Principal Engineer / Director-level AI Strategy role. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, advanced AI credentials, or the strategic customer- and partner-facing influence the role demands. Recent AI exposure is limited to a few months of MCP/agent tooling, and prior roles centered on feature delivery rather than shaping cloud/AI future-state strategy — making this a weak fit.
